jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Pepperfry
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pepperfry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Pepperfry:
Pepperfry is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
